briefdescription.para: A wait-free intrusive multi producer single consumer (MPSC) queue using a singly linked list.

detaileddescription.para: Based on the well known and widely used wait-free MPSC queue described by Dmitry Vyukov with some slight changes to account for needs of an RTOS on a variety of archs. Both consumer and producer are wait free. No CAS loop or lock is needed.
An MPSC queue is safe to produce or consume in an ISR with O(1) push/pop.

simplesect.para: MPSC is not safe to consume in multiple execution contexts.
